zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon I. zur Lippe於1260年出生在荷蘭時，他的父親Bernhard IV. zur Lippe30歲，母親Agnes von Kleve28歲。他於1276年11月24日與Adelheid von Waldeck在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1344年8月10日享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon I. zur Lippe于1260年出生在荷兰时，他的父亲Bernhard IV. zur Lippe30岁，母亲Agnes von Kleve28岁。他于1276年11月24日与Adelheid von Waldeck在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1344年8月10日享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: zur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ofer, Yael, Amikam, Amram, Ari, Uri.
Jewish (Israeli): artificial name from Hebrew tsur ‘rock’. In some cases it may also be a translation of some original Ashkenazic surname with similar meaning (e.g. Fels or Stein ).
Polish (Żur): nickname from żur ‘sour soup’ (see Zurek ). Compare Schur .

variants.name: Fels
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Kurt, Sieglinde, Wolfgang.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near high ground or by a prominent crag, from Middle High German vels ‘rock, cliff’.

nameMeanings.name: Lippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the duchy of Lippe, which became an independent state in the 12th century.
German: topographic name for someone living on the banks of the Lippe river in Westphalia.

variants.name: Lipp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Frieda, Hans, Wendelin, Franz, Konrad, Otto, Rainer, Ralf.
English: nickname from Middle English lippe ‘lip’ (Old English lippa).
English: from the Middle English personal name Leppe, Lippe (pet forms of one or more Old English names containing Lēof- ‘dear, beloved’ as the first element). Compare Lewin 1.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon I. zur Lippe was born in 1260, in Netherlands, his father, Bernhard IV. zur Lippe, was 30 and his mother, Agnes von Kleve, was 28. He married Adelheid von Waldeck on 24 November 1276, in Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 10 August 1344, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon I. zur Lippe est né en 1260, à Pays-Bas, son père, Bernhard IV. zur Lippe, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Kleve, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Waldeck le 24 novembre 1276, à Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 10 août 1344, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon I. zur Lippe 1260 in Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernhard IV. zur Lippe 30 und seine Mutter Agnes von Kleve 28. Er hat am 24. November 1276 in Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont Adelheid von Waldeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 10. August 1344 im Alter von 84 Jahren.

Lui sposato Adelheid von Waldeck il 24 novembre 1276, nel Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 agosto 1344, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon I. zur Lippeが1260年にオランダで生まれた時，父Bernhard IV. zur Lippeは30歳，母Agnes von Kleveは28歳であった。1276年11月24日にワルデク-プイルモントイーダーワルデックでAdelheid von Waldeckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1344年8月10日に84歳で死去した。

ko.Brake, Lemgo, Lippe, North Rhine-Westpha: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 리프 레고 브라크
ko.lifeSummary: Simon I. zur Lippe(이)가 1260년 네덜란드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernhard IV. zur Lippe(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes von Kleve(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1276년 11월 24일 월덱-p이몽 에더 월덱에서 Adelheid von Waldeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1344년 8월 10일 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon I. zur Lippe nasceu em 1260, em Países Baixos, seu pai, Bernhard IV. zur Lippe, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Kleve, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid von Waldeck em 24 de novembro de 1276, em Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1344, com 84 anos.

ru.Brake, Lemgo, Lippe, North Rhine-Westpha: бреик, лемго, крис липп, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon I. zur Lippe родился в 1260 г. в местности Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Bernhard IV. zur Lippe было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Kleve, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Waldeck 24 ноября 1276 г. в местности валдекк, эдир, валдекк-пирмонт. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 10 августа 1344 г. в возрасте 84 лет.

Se casó con Adelheid von Waldeck el 24 de noviembre de 1276, en Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1344, a la edad de 84 años.
